evidence: DMS code written for Llama-2-7B attention (4D mask B,1,T,T)
Qwen3 uses GQA with different attention mask expectations
Smoke test hits: RuntimeError on mask shape mismatch (5D vs 4D)
Also fixed: hidden_dim detection (head_dim vs q_proj), dtype mismatch in decision head
Model meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf is gated (401), Qwen/Qwen3-8B is accessible
proposed_action: Spawn coder to adapt DMS attention wrapper for Qwen3 architecture: 1) Fix mask shape for GQA (Qwen3 has 16 KV heads, 32 Q heads) 2) Ensure position_embeddings passthrough works 3) Test smoke test passes

evidence: Launch failed: TypeError torch.finfo() requires floating point input type
Line 115 handles it correctly with explicit dtype parameter
Line 202 needs same fix: use attn_mask.dtype if float else torch.float32
proposed_action: Fix line 202 in src/memory/dms/dms_attention.py: NEG_INF = torch.finfo(attn_mask.dtype if attn_mask.is_floating_point() else torch.float32).min

evidence: RuntimeError: Expected all tensors to be on the same device, but got index is on cuda:X, different from other tensors on cpu (wrapper_CUDA__index_select). All 8 ranks hit this. Occurs during trainer.compute_loss -> model forward -> DMS attention. Likely an index tensor in DMS attention wrapper not being moved to the correct device.
proposed_action: Fix device placement in DMS attention wrapper (src/memory/dms/dms_attention.py) - ensure all index tensors are on the same device as the hidden states
